# Commercial Mortgages Coventry
> Specialist commercial mortgage broker for Coventry, the JLR Whitley engineering centre, the Coventry Gateway logistics corridor and the wider West Midlands. Industrial, automotive supply chain, retail, semi-commercial, HMO portfolio and trading-business commercial mortgages from a 90+ lender panel including Shawbrook, InterBay Commercial, LendInvest, Cynergy Bank, Lloyds, NatWest, Barclays and Santander. Indicative terms in 48 hours, completion typically 4 to 8 weeks.

## Content Hierarchy
- /: Homepage with Coventry market snapshot, live planning pipeline, calculator, lender panel, area grid, case studies, testimonials, FAQ
- /services/: Commercial mortgage product hub
- /property-types/: Coverage by sector
- /areas/: Coventry sub-areas with commercial planning and market data
- /calculator/: Commercial mortgage repayment and LTV calculator
- /blog/: Market commentary and rate insights
- /case-studies/: Anonymised real deals
- /about/: Broker bio and credentials
- /how-it-works/: 5-step process
- /contact/: Enquiry form
- /faq/: Frequently asked questions

## Key Facts
- Service: Commercial mortgages
- Coverage: Coventry, Ansty fringe, Ryton, Warwick fringe (CV4 University of Warwick), the wider West Midlands
- Facility size: £150K to £10M
- Term: 5 to 25 years
- LTV: typically 65 to 75% (industrial up to 70%, semi-commercial up to 75%, trading-business 60 to 70%)
- Rates (mid-2026): 6.0 to 9.0% pa
- Lender panel: 90+ lenders
- Decision time: indicative terms in 48 hours
- Named lenders: Shawbrook, InterBay Commercial, LendInvest, Cynergy Bank, Lloyds, NatWest, Barclays, Santander, plus 80+ others

## Data
Each area page contains live local market data:
- Land Registry sold-data signal (residential transaction volume as market temperature)
- Live commercial planning pipeline from Coventry City Council Public Access portal
- Named regeneration zones and business districts (Friargate, City Centre South, Coventry Gateway, Whitley, Whitmoor Park, UKBIC battery R&D, FarGo Village, Far Gosford Street)
- Named demand anchors (Jaguar Land Rover Whitley, UK Battery Industrialisation Centre, Coventry University, University of Warwick, UHCW Walsgrave, Severn Trent HQ)
- Lender appetite by sector
